case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LEA KUSHNIR

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED FEB-29-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KUSHNIR, LEA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KUSHNIR, LEA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-20-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KUSHNIR, LEA
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 595(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-20-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15257044)
